scripts.test: node --check server.js && node --check controllers/authController.js && node --check middleware/adminMiddleware.js && node --test tests/*.test.js
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check controllers/authController.js && node --check middleware/authMiddleware.js && node --check middleware/adminMiddleware.js && node --check controllers/walletController.js && node --check models/transactionModel.js && node --check utils/jwtConfig.js
scripts.check:db: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const db=require('./config/db'); db.execute('SELECT 1').then(()=>{console.log('DB OK'); process.exit(0)}).catch((err)=>{console.error('DB check failed:', err.message); process.exit(1)})"
